title: Iris/Oculus & GeckoLib Compat
description: Fixes GeckoLib animations not working if using a shaderpack with entity shadows.
body:
# Iris / Oculus & GeckoLib Compat

Fixes GeckoLib entities' animations not working while using shaderpacks that have entity shadows.

Example of a GeckoLib entity working with Insanity Shader, using entity shadows.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5kLo4HdSz44" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
